NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-21-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF STEVEN MARTIN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
